headline: Why Is Paramount Skydance (PSKY) Up 1.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Paramount Skydance (PSKY) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: CBS fires veteran correspondent Scott Pelley amid turmoil over direction of '60 Minutes'
summary: CBS News has fired high-profile "60 Minutes" correspondent Scott Pelley amid debate about the direction of the show, a mainstay of the network.
